questions.question: The Thar Desert is classified as which of the following?
What is the longitudinal extent of India?
The Western Coastal Plains are narrower and lie between which features?
questions.option_2: Eastern Ghats and Bay of Bengal

questions.question: What is the approximate area covered by the Thar Desert in India?
Which region of the Northern Plains is made of older alluvium?
Which zone of the Great Indian Plains has high humidity and marshy conditions?
In the context of India’s population distribution, the term physiological density refers to population per _____.
Which country lies to the east of Arunachal Pradesh?
What is the name of the point where India, China and Myanmar meet?
Which of the following countries is completely landlocked and shares an open border with India?
Which of the following countries DOES NOT share a land boundary with India?
Which of the following Indian states shares an international boundary with three countries?
Which of the following states has a sparse population mainly due to hilly terrain?
Which region in India is the least populated due to physical barriers and limited accessibility?
Which of the following ports is located in West Coastal Plain?
Which of these ports is located on the Western Coastal Plain?
On the MS PowerPoint 2019 home screen, which option or section should you click to start a new blank presentation when the 'Start Screen' is enabled?
questions.option_1: The Design tab from the ribbon
questions.option_2: The Open button at the bottom left corner
questions.option_3: The tile labeled 'Blank Presentation' on the right panel
questions.option_4: The Recent tab in the left sidebar
